live.title: Chelsea vs Leeds United - Semi-Final - 26 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Chelsea face Leeds United at Wembley in a high‑stakes FA Cup semi‑final, with a place in the final firmly on the line. Chelsea will look to assert control through possession and attacking quality, while Leeds arrive intent on bringing intensity, pressing high, and disrupting the rhythm in search of a famous victory. With silverware within touching distance, this showdown promises drama, pressure, and fine margins under the Wembley spotlight. Catch all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: Borussia Dortmund vs SC Freiburg - MD 31 - 26 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription:
Borussia Dortmund take on SC Freiburg in an exciting Bundesliga clash, with both sides aiming to strengthen their position in the table.
Dortmund will look to capitalize on home advantage with their attacking firepower, while Freiburg aim to stay compact and threaten on the counter in what promises to be a competitive encounter. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
